  1. org.springframework.data.repository.core
  2. RepositoryMethodContext

Uses of Interface
org.springframework.data.repository.core.RepositoryMethodContext

Packages that use RepositoryMethodContext
Package
Description
org.springframework.data.repository.core
Core abstractions for repository implementation.
org.springframework.data.repository.core.support
Base classes to implement repositories for various data stores.

  • Uses of RepositoryMethodContext in org.springframework.data.repository.core

    Methods in org.springframework.data.repository.core that return RepositoryMethodContext
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static RepositoryMethodContext
    RepositoryMethodContext.getContext()
    Try to return the current repository method metadata.
    static RepositoryMethodContext
    RepositoryMethodContextHolder.getContext()
    Try to return the current repository method metadata.
    static @Nullable RepositoryMethodContext
    RepositoryMethodContextHolder.setContext(@Nullable RepositoryMethodContext context)
    Make the given repository method metadata available via the RepositoryMethodContextHolder.getContext() method.
    Methods in org.springframework.data.repository.core with parameters of type RepositoryMethodContext
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static @Nullable RepositoryMethodContext
    RepositoryMethodContextHolder.setContext(@Nullable RepositoryMethodContext context)
    Make the given repository method metadata available via the RepositoryMethodContextHolder.getContext() method.

  • Uses of RepositoryMethodContext in org.springframework.data.repository.core.support

    Classes in org.springframework.data.repository.core.support that implement RepositoryMethodContext
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    DefaultRepositoryMethodContext
    Class containing value objects providing information about the current repository method invocation.
    Methods in org.springframework.data.repository.core.support that return RepositoryMethodContext
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static RepositoryMethodContext
    DefaultRepositoryMethodContext.forMethod(Method method)
    Creates a new RepositoryMethodContext for the given Method.
